issues.description: Effect starts with 'Look at 5 cards from top of deck' but DSL omits SearchDeck/deck inspection action entirely. Must first search/look at 5 cards.
RevealFromHand is incorrect. Card text says 'reveal up to 1 [Richie]' from the deck inspection, not from hand. Should be structured as SearchDeck or similar deck-lookup action.
Missing action: 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order'. This reordering step is mandatory and must be represented in DSL.
PlayFromHand is conditional on RevealFromHand, but the reveal happens during deck search, not from hand. The play action should be independent conditional on 'up to 1 [Richie] is in hand'.
